message:
feat(mission): runtime config schema with validation, overrides, and resolution (ft-1i2ge.5.4)

Add MissionRuntimeConfig as the top-level operator config schema with
profile selection, partial overrides (ScorerConfigOverrides, GovernorConfigOverrides,
ExtractionConfigOverrides), additional safety gates/conflicts. Config validation
with error/warning/info diagnostics. resolve() produces ResolvedMissionConfig
ready for the mission loop. 27 new tests (173 total in planner_features).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
